prompt:
Session 004 - Cinematic Performance
Asset ID: 019
Filename: 019_genuine_laughter.png
Purpose: A spontaneous genuine laugh. Not posing. Not smiling for a camera. Someone has genuinely surprised Chloe.
Success Criteria: Eyes participate, face softens, and the moment feels human rather than performed.
Generation Guidance: 85mm portrait lens, eye level, chest-up framing, neutral dark background, soft cinematic lighting, natural skin and freckles, same dark wavy hair. Chloe laughs genuinely while preserving her exact approved identity.
Review Focus: Reject if the laugh becomes beauty posing, theatrical, childlike, fashion styled, or identity-drifting.
Locked references: Identity Core v1, Character Turnaround v1, Performance Core v1, Chloe Model v1.
Primary rule: Preserve Chloe exactly; only cinematic emotional state may change.
negative_prompt: Avoid theatrical acting, facial identity drift, artificial skin, changed hair, beauty-model posing, fashion styling, dramatic makeup, exaggerated emotion, childlike appearance, text, watermark.
notes: Canonical cinematic laughter reference. Spontaneous genuine laugh with excellent identity continuity.
approval_directive: Session 004 partial approval. Asset promoted to canonical cinematic performance reference.
